title: Development of an Art Portfolio Management System Complemented by a Think-Alout Protocol
author: Ján Korkoš
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset was created to fulfill the task of  bachelor thesis .   Dataset can be used for research in the field of Think-Aloud Protocol. 

 Dataset contais data and recordings in  Slovak language , from process of development the Portfolio Application. 

 Aplication source-code is available at GitHub:  https://github.com/JancoKorky/portfolio
